response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Partially matched. Song 1 ('大人なフリして。') had no reference lyrics in the JSON input, requiring 100% manual transcription. Song 2 ('chocolate box') matched the provided reference lyrics perfectly.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics from the 'chocolate box' segment of the reference JSON while discarding unused portions that extended past the video's end. Song 1 was transcribed manually.
3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are precisely aligned to the vocal onset millisecond. Truncations and instantaneous transitions were applied aggressively to handle the fast-paced segments of both songs, avoiding any cascading delay. A visual subtitle was included for the song title card 'chocolate box' at 04:11.000.

subtitles.original: また会いに行く 会いたいから
subtitles.english: I'll go see you again, because I want to see you.

subtitles.original: 別々に落ち合う 街の風は少し冷たい
subtitles.english: Meeting up separately, the city breeze is a little cold.

subtitles.original: 慣れないワイン 無理矢理飲み干してしまってはフラフラ
subtitles.english: Gulping down wine I'm not used to, I'm already feeling dizzy.

subtitles.original: 嫌われちゃったらどうしよう
subtitles.english: What if you end up hating me?

subtitles.original: 下手にしちゃったらどうしよう
subtitles.english: What if I mess things up?

subtitles.original: 少しも残したくない
subtitles.english: I don't want to leave even a little bit behind.

subtitles.original: ちょっと期待してね
subtitles.english: Anticipating just a bit...

subtitles.original: ずっと見栄張ってね
subtitles.english: constantly putting on airs...

subtitles.original: 周りばかり気にして生きている
subtitles.english: always living while worrying about others.

subtitles.original: ちょっと憂鬱かも でもなんか寂しくてあぁ
subtitles.english: Maybe I'm a bit depressed, but somehow I feel lonely, ah.

subtitles.original: 本当の自分じゃない気がして
subtitles.english: Feeling like I'm not my true self.

subtitles.original: いつも分かったフリして
subtitles.english: Always pretending to understand,

subtitles.original: そんなんじゃないのに無理して
subtitles.english: forcing myself even though I'm not like that.

subtitles.original: 価値のないキスでも やっぱ一番嬉しくて
subtitles.english: Even a worthless kiss makes me the happiest.

subtitles.original: 取り繕った私は可愛いかな？
subtitles.english: I wonder if my made-up self is cute?

subtitles.original: 今夜は壊れるほど抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Tonight, hug me tight enough to break.

subtitles.original: 今にも切れそうな糸で繋がっている恋だね
subtitles.english: This is a love connected by a thread that's about to break.

subtitles.original: 私が諦めたらきっと簡単に消えちゃうね
subtitles.english: If I give up, it'll surely disappear so easily.

subtitles.original: 引き留めるにはどうする？
subtitles.english: What should I do to hold you back?

subtitles.original: あの子だったらどうする？
subtitles.english: What would that girl do?

subtitles.original: 不器用に唇を絡めて
subtitles.english: Awkwardly intertwining our lips.

subtitles.original: いつもチェックしてね
subtitles.english: Always check on me,

subtitles.original: 息苦しい腕で
subtitles.english: with your stifling arms.

subtitles.original: 他の子と比べてばかりいた
subtitles.english: You were always comparing me to other girls.

subtitles.original: 一番見てほしい あなたの目の前の私は
subtitles.english: The one I want you to look at the most is me right in front of you,

subtitles.original: どこか違う景色見てる
subtitles.english: yet you're looking at some other scenery.

subtitles.original: いつも優しいフリして
subtitles.english: Always pretending to be kind,

subtitles.original: そんなんじゃないのに笑って
subtitles.english: smiling even though you're not like that.

subtitles.original: 近づけば近づくほど心は遠くなって
subtitles.english: The closer we get, the further apart our hearts become.

subtitles.original: 少しずつ離れていくことは分かるよ
subtitles.english: I know we're slowly drifting apart.

subtitles.original: 今夜は忘れるほど抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Tonight, hug me tight enough to forget everything.

subtitles.original: 自分はもっと強いと
subtitles.english: If only I were stronger,

subtitles.original: 言えばさよならを言えるのにね
subtitles.english: then I could say goodbye.

subtitles.original: いつも分かったフリして
subtitles.english: Always pretending to understand,

subtitles.original: そんなんじゃないのに無理して
subtitles.english: forcing myself even though I'm not like that.

subtitles.original: ふと見せる優しさがずっと忘れられなくて
subtitles.english: I can never forget the kindness you suddenly show.

subtitles.original: 取り繕った私は可愛いかな？
subtitles.english: I wonder if my made-up self is cute?

subtitles.original: 今夜は壊れるほど抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Tonight, hug me tight enough to break.

subtitles.original: 零れだした涙
subtitles.english: The tears that began to overflow,...

subtitles.original: 私頑張ったよね
subtitles.english: I really tried my best, didn't I?

subtitles.original: いつか振り向いてくれると思っていたもういいから
subtitles.english: I thought you'd turn to look at me someday, but it's fine now.

subtitles.original: 取り繕った私は流れていく
subtitles.english: My made-up self is washing away.

subtitles.original: 今夜は忘れるほど抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Tonight, hug me tight enough to forget everything.

subtitles.original: chocolate box
subtitles.english: chocolate box

subtitles.original: なんかいつも眠そうだし
subtitles.english: You always seem so sleepy,

subtitles.original: なんかいつもつまんなそうだし
subtitles.english: and you always seem so bored.

subtitles.original: なんかいつもヤバそうだし
subtitles.english: You always seem so sketchy,

subtitles.original: なんかいつもスマホいじってるし
subtitles.english: and you're always on your phone.

subtitles.original: ホントはテンション高いのに
subtitles.english: Though you're actually usually hyper,...

subtitles.original: アタシといると超低いし
subtitles.english: you're so quiet when you're with me.

subtitles.original: なんなん自分?ありえなくない?
subtitles.english: What is up with you? That's unbelievable!

subtitles.original: 嫌い、大嫌い。どうでもいい!!
subtitles.english: I hate you, I really hate you! Whatever!!

subtitles.original: だったらボクも言うけどさぁ!
subtitles.english: Well, then I've got some things to say too!

subtitles.original: ちっちゃい事で すぐ怒るし
subtitles.english: You get mad easily over tiny things,

subtitles.original: 言い返したら すぐ泣くし
subtitles.english: and when I talk back, you cry right away.

subtitles.original: ごめんって言っても 許してくれないし
subtitles.english: Even when I say sorry, you don't forgive me.

subtitles.original: その割 一夜が明けちゃえば
subtitles.english: But despite all of that, the next morning...

subtitles.original: ケロっと おはようとか言うし
subtitles.english: you'll nonchalantly say "Good morning!"

subtitles.original: あぁ なんて罪深い人なんだ
subtitles.english: Ah, what a sinful person you are.

subtitles.original: 畜生!! もう知らないぞ!!
subtitles.english: Dammit!! I'm done with you!!

subtitles.original: 甘い甘い恋 of 魔法箱 (甘い甘い恋の魔法箱)
subtitles.english: A sweet, sweet magic box of love,

subtitles.original: 宇宙味の秘密のチョコレート
subtitles.english: a secret chocolate tasting of outer space.

subtitles.original: 二人だけのデコレーションを
subtitles.english: Let's scatter our own decorations...

subtitles.original: 散りばめて彩って食べちゃおうか!
subtitles.english: and decorate it before we eat it up!
